themeName: Sea of Stories: A BookTok & Bookstagram Reading Voyage

visual.aestheticLabel: Understated calm, coastal library at sea

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: High-contrast modern serif with soft small-caps and generous tracking; used sparingly for hero lines and lockups while brand typefaces lead UI.
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: Warm, readable humanist sans for all running copy and captions; calm letterspacing, no shouty all-caps.

visual.imageryMood: Breezy, book-in-hand serenity with horizon-forward calmâlinen textures, paper edges, and ocean blues framing unhurried travel.
visual.lightingStyle: Morning hush and golden-hour glow; bright but softened windowlight indoors; gentle, salt-tinged overcast on deckânever high-drama spotlighting.
visual.compositionNotes: Ship-first, ocean-forward frames with generous negative space. One or two relaxed guests max, seated or leaned at rail; a slim paperback or e-reader may appear as a quiet detail, not the subject. Clean lines of Celebrity Ascent (Edge-class) architecture, Eden greenery bokeh, and balcony or Rooftop Garden vantage points. Keep signage invisible; no crowds, no table clutter. Texture cues (linen, vellum, brass) can live in wardrobe or a single prop.
avoidList: Lecture-style setups, mics, or standing presenters
Crowded tables with stacks of books
Name badges, lanyards, or table tents in focus
Whiteboards, flip charts, or classroom rows
Step-and-repeat photo walls or promo banners
Ring lights or tripod rigs in public spaces
Literal library rooms built on deck
Overstuffed tote staging that blocks the ocean
referenceMoodboard: Linen and vellum paper texture swatches
Ink-blue serif title on oat background
Eden lounge greenery and soft windowlight (Celebrity Ascent)
Magic Carpet orange as a restrained accent line only
Mediterranean horizon with gentle sea-spray haze
Brass library-lamp warmth meeting cool deck blues

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Let bookish identity ride inside normal cruise lifeâone subtle cue (wardrobe, a slim paperback, a soft conversational beat) layered onto ship-first, ocean-forward momentsânever infrastructure or schedule leading the frame.
cruiseNativeMoments: Sea-day chaise with horizon view and iced espresso
Window-seat lounge time in Eden with plant canopy bokeh
Pre-dinner pause at the Martini Bar
Balcony sunrise with blanket and quiet air
nicheEnhancedMoments: A linen shirt cuff resting on a closed paperback by the rail
A literary-named cocktail on a simple surface beside a calm gaze to sea
Two guests angled inward on a sofa, a half-smile at a character mention
A single bookmark peeking from a pocket during a deck walk
A discreet bring-one/take-one shelf glimpsed in a lounge corner, no crowd
implausibleLiteralizations: Author keynotes in the main theater with Q&A lines
Masterclass-style critique or graded analysis scenes
Big classroom rows with handouts and a lectern
Mandatory reading lists or badge tiers
Overt BookTok ring-light recording pits on deck
A staged âlibraryâ built from carted book towers blocking views
allowedProps: Single brass-tone bookmark or fabric ribbon
Light cardigan, linen layers, tortoiseshell readers
Discrete enamel pin or tiny book-charm jewelry
One understated bookish tote resting at feet (not hero)
discouragedProps: Whiteboards, flip charts, and sticky-note walls
Signage stacks, QR placards, or table tents
Wheeled book carts and bulk crates
Ring lights, tripods, or boom arms
Name badges, lanyards, or color-coded seating maps

messaging.heroSlogan: Sea of Stories aboard Celebrity Ascent
messaging.subSlogan: An unhurried reading voyage through Greece & Turkeyâocean-first, book in hand.
messaging.elevatorPitch: Read where the horizon runs long. Sea of Stories brings BookTok and Bookstagram energy to a true vacation rhythm on Celebrity Ascent (Edge-class): slow mornings, window-lit lounges, soft jazz, and the Aegean drifting by. Join easy, guest-led momentsâan offhand recommendation at the bar, a bookmark traded after dessert, a literary nod on the menuâno schedules, no pressure. Ten nights through Greece & Turkey where great food and better pages meet the open sea.
messaging.voicePersona: Warm, well-read travel friendâlightly poetic, never preachy; cruise-native first, book-forward in the margins.

merch.conceptStatement: Make the bookish layer wearable: linen-and-paper vibes with ink-blue restraint, ocean linework, and a wink of literary witâ1â2 color, print-friendly, suitcase-soft.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Morning comes quiet. Linen against skin, a page lifts in the breeze. Somewhere a brush of cymbals, a low bass walkingâsoft jazz tucked into the day. You lean toward the horizon; Greece and Turkey wait ahead but thereâs nowhere to rush. The ship carries its own calm library: a window seat in Eden, a balcony with pale light, the low clink of a glass. A sentence lands. Another. The sea approves. Read a little, look up a lot, and let the coast write the margins.
audio.hypeClipScript: Horizon. A page turns. Ink blue, linen light. Edenâs leaves swayâsoft jazz, soft smiles. Balcony sunrise; Rooftop dusk. A quiet nod at the bar, a title passed like a secret. Greece. Turkey. Ten nights to read slow and live well. No scheduleâjust ocean, prose, and the right chair. Sea of Storiesâaboard Celebrity Ascent.
audio.voiceProfile: Warm, bookish alto or light tenor; intimate mic, soft consonants, smile in the read; global-neutral accent.
audio.musicMood: Brushed snares, upright bass, mellow Rhodes and nylon guitar; 70â82 BPM, coastal jazz with Mediterranean airânever showy, always breathable.

narrative.title: Horizon > WiâFi
narrative.scriptOrNarration: VO: Read a little. Look up a lot. Ten nights through Greece & Turkey aboard Celebrity Ascentâocean first, book in hand. No rush. Just the right chair and the right line.
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Cut 1: Balcony sunriseâlinen blanket edge, ocean dominant. Cut 2: Eden window seatâleafy bokeh, a pair of tortoiseshell readers at collar. Cut 3: Rooftop Garden silhouettes at golden hourâtwo guests lean at the rail, a slim paperback glimpsed then pocketed. Cut 4: Martini Bar glass set down; soft smile, horizon beyond. Ship-first framing, minimal props, negative space, Magic Carpet accent as a subtle color echo only.
narrative.backgroundDescription: Celebrity Ascent balcony, Eden lounge, Rooftop Garden, Martini Bar. Morning hush and golden-hour glow; bright softened windowlight, ocean breeze.
narrative.musicMood: Brushed snares, upright bass, mellow Rhodes at ~76 BPMâair-light coastal jazz.

tiktokOrganic.caption: Sea-day pages with a side of Aegean. Sea of Stories aboard Celebrity Ascent. Read slow. Sail slow.

instagramReels.caption: A title passed like a secret. Sea of Storiesâaboard Celebrity Ascent.

heroExplainer.title: Sea of Stories | Celebrity Ascent Hero Film
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: VO (warm alto/tenor): Morning comes quiet. Linen against skin, a page lifts in the breeze. Soft jazz tucked into the day. You lean toward the horizon; Greece and Turkey wait ahead but thereâs nowhere to rush. Celebrity Ascent carries its own calm library: a window seat in Eden, a balcony with pale light, the low clink of a glass. A sentence lands. Another. The sea approves. Read a little, look up a lot, and let the coast write the margins. Sea of Storiesâaboard Celebrity Ascent.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Open on balcony sunrise (ocean > 70% of frame). Move to Eden windowlight with plant bokeh; brief wardrobe cue (readers at collar). Rooftop Garden golden silhouettes, then Martini Bar glass set down. Port texture pass-by (whitewashed lanes distant, laurel sprig detail). End on wake at dusk with serif lockup. No signage, no crowds, no lecture setups.
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: Celebrity Ascent balcony, Eden lounge, Rooftop Garden, Martini Bar. Morning hush to golden-hour glow; salt-tinged overcast on deck.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Brushed snares, upright bass, mellow Rhodes/nylon guitar at ~78 BPMâbreathable and coastal.
